siteTitle: Ozly - Unlimited Invoices & Tax Under Control

hero.title: No more mess. Shifts, Invoices & Tax in one place.
hero.titleHighlight: Built for ABN workers in Australia.
hero.subtitle: Schedule all your jobs, generate a PDF Invoice in 15 seconds and send it to your client on the spot. Track expenses, know how much the ATO will charge and see the clean cash in your pocket — all for just {price}.

audience.title: Built by immigrants for the daily grind:

features.title: Everything an ABN worker needs,
features.subtitle: Stop juggling 4 different apps. Ozly handles shifts, invoices, tax and expenses in one place.
features.shiftsDesc: Finished the job, generated the PDF and sent it to the client on the spot. Unlimited sends, no fuss.
features.ocrDesc: Snapped a receipt from Bunnings or the servo? The app reads it, links it to the job and calculates your ATO deduction.
features.trackerDesc: One screen to see who paid, what's pending and who owes you. Stop losing money.
features.forecastDesc: Know exactly how much clean cash you'll have in your pocket at the end of the month. No surprises at Tax Return time.

comparison.title: Ozly vs
comparison.subtitle: Other apps limit PDFs, charge a % of your profit and are too complicated for someone hustling on the road. Ozly is offline and unlimited.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: No surprises, no per-invoice fee, no percentage of your earnings. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

homeFaq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
homeFaq.subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions about Ozly.
homeFaq.stillQuestionsDesc: Get in touch or explore our complete guide with step-by-step instructions for every feature.

guide.title: Complete User Guide & FAQ
guide.subtitle: Everything you need to know to use Ozly and organise your jobs, invoices and finances in Australia.
guide.contactSubtitle: Send us an email and we'll get back to you quickly.

bottomCta.title: While you're reading this, someone is sending an Invoice through Ozly.
bottomCta.subtitle: And getting paid faster than you. Download the app and start now.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.summary: Ozly is a workforce-management and expense-tracking application designed for Australian contractors and small businesses. We collect only the data necessary to deliver our services. Your financial data is encrypted on your device, and you may request complete deletion of your account and all associated data at any time.
privacy.s8: 8. Your Rights Under Australian Privacy Law

terms.title: Terms of Use (EULA)
terms.importantText: By downloading, installing, or using the Ozly application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the App.

faq.pageSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about Ozly. Can't find what you need? Get in touch.
faq.contactSubtitle: Send us an email and we'll get back to you quickly.
faq.a1: Ozly is an app built especially for ABN workers in Australia — Cleaners, Tradies, Delivery riders and any Sole Trader. It combines shifts, unlimited invoices, expense tracking with OCR, payment tracker and financial forecast all in one place.
faq.q2: How does the Payment Tracker work?
faq.a2: The Tracker shows all your invoices organised by status: paid, pending and overdue. You instantly know who owes you and never lose track of money again.
faq.a3: Ozly has 3 plans: TFN ($9/month) for employees, ABN ($15/month) for ABN holders, and MAX ($19/month) for both. All plans include a 14-day free trial. No invoice limits, no percentage of your earnings.
faq.a4: Yes! Ozly works 100% offline. You can create invoices, log expenses and track your jobs without wifi. Everything syncs automatically when you're back online.
faq.a5: Just take a photo of your receipt. Ozly's AI automatically extracts the amount, date and description. Confirm it and the expense is logged for tax deduction.
faq.q6: Does the app calculate my tax?
faq.a6: Yes. Ozly estimates how much tax you'll owe following ATO (Australian Taxation Office) rules. No surprises at tax return time.
faq.q7: Can I send invoices via WhatsApp?
faq.a7: Yes! After generating the PDF invoice, you can share it directly via WhatsApp, email or any other app on your phone.
faq.q8: Is Ozly available in other languages?
faq.a8: Yes! Ozly is available in Portuguese, English and Spanish, both in the app and on the website.
faq.q9: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.a9: You can cancel anytime directly through the App Store or Google Play. No hassle, no cancellation fee.
faq.a10: The Financial Forecast shows how much clean cash you'll have in your pocket at the end of the month, after expenses and taxes. No surprises at Tax Return time.
faq.a11: Visa Shield monitors your work hours per fortnight (rolling 14 days) to help you stay under the 48-hour limit for work and student visas. It sums hours across ALL your ABNs automatically.
faq.a12: The Hustle Score is a gamification system that rewards you with XP for completing jobs, creating invoices, logging expenses and maintaining streaks. You progress through 4 tiers: Starter, Hustler, Pro and Legend.
faq.a13: Yes. Your local database is encrypted with SQLCipher (AES-256), tokens are stored in the iOS Keychain / Android Keystore, and all server data is protected by Row-Level Security. We never log sensitive data like TFN, BSB or passwords.
faq.q14: How does the referral program work?
faq.a14: Share your unique referral code with friends. When they sign up using your code, both of you earn rewards. You also get 500 XP for each successful referral.
